title: WOSUK Sonic Electric Toothbrushes, Sonic Electric Toothbrushes Travel-Friendly Design 4 Modes 16 Gears with 4 Brush Heads USB Fast Charge Built-in Smart Timer for Adults and Kids
description:
4 Modes Design(Each mode has four intensity adjustments)
1.Four-gear(weak, medium, strong, stronger) cleaning mode(Clean)about 32,000 times/minute, through the soundwave toothbrush high-frequency vibration, thoroughly clean teeth, completely clean eacharea of the mouth, generally normal use of this mode. 2.Four-gear(weak, medium, strong, stronger) sens ive mode(Milder)about 35,000 times/minute, the first use of sonic toothbrushes, it is recommended to use this mode. Toothache and tooth allergies use thispattern to make teeth more comfortable. 3.Four-gear(weak, medium, strong, stronger) white mode(White) about38,000 to 45,000 times/minute, a variety of frequency mode operation,more effective to go tea stains, tobacco stains, dental plaque, this modefor people with higher needs design. 4.Four-gear(weak, medium, strong, stronger) gum health mode (Mas care) about 31,000 to 46,000 times/minute, high-frequency rhythmic shock, improve coffee stains, tobacco stains, tea stains, suitable for stubborn dental stains people to use.
Note: This machine has a memory function to automatically savethe last used gear
Power/Mode:
1. Press the power button, continucus press to shift among modes(press within 2s) 2. Each mode has 4 intensity adjustments(press within 2s) 3. Press the power button, press again after 3-4s use to turn off.
2 Minute Smart Timer
2 Mins Smart Timer & Along lasting Battery Life - Built-in Timer with 2 mins auto shut-off and  interval pause of reminding to change brushing areas every 30s helps to give you a total mouth clean,  With this brush you will improve your oral health easily. Designed with USB fast charging system.
Package Includes:
1 x Electric Toothbrush 4 x Replacement toothbrush heads 1 x Charging Cable without Adapter 1 x Instruction Manual
features: 46,000 Strokes Per Min with Sonic Technology & The advanced sonic technology delivers a high-speed vibration to efficiently remove up to 300% more stains. 4 modes of whiten, clean, sensitive, polish and massage (Each mode has 4 vibration intensities) to meet different oral needs and best fit your brushing aims.

2 Mins Smart Timer & Along lasting Battery Life - Built-in Timer with 2 mins auto shut-off and interval pause of reminding to change brushing areas every 30s helps to give you a total mouth clean, With this brush you will improve your oral health easily. Designed with USB fast charging system.

Comes with 4 replacement brush heads to avoid order new replacement brush heads frequently. The bristles are made with DUPONT nylon, "W" shape design to suit teeth topography for thorough cleaning of gums and hard to reach areas.

Sleek Lightweight Design & IPX 8 Waterproof Rating- These stylish toothbrushes are made for home or travel! It is very easy and convenient to pack them in your travel bag with brush head protective covers included. With them being waterproof feel free to use them in the shower.

Get a full days use from only one 5 minute charge. Get over 30 days use from only one full charge of 2 hours. with low battery reminding and automatically cuts off power after full charge. Also, IPX8 waterproof to be used at bath and shower. No worry about the water would enter the charge ports to short the battery life, More safer than USB charger.

reviews.title: a mouthful of noise.
reviews.text: I thank for the money I guess it's alright. It's very inexpensive. The drawback is very noisy and in your mouth that might not be a good posy. Thank you. God bless you and may the rest of your life be the best of your life.  OZ

reviews.title: Noisy
reviews.text: This toothbrush is fine. It cleans teeth well and is a reasonable price. It comes with 4 toothbrush heads (2 are in the little box with the charger). It charges via USB and has to be laid on its side to charge, which is a bit of a bummer especially considering there is no cover for the toothbrush heads. It doesn't arrive charged. It charges in a couple of hours. It's noisier than other electric toothbrushes we've used. You hear a constant beeping while you brush. Overall, it's okay, but I would recommend a different product if price isn't an issue.

title: Oral-B Pulsar Battery Toothbrush With Charcoal Infused Bristles, Soft
description: Oral B Pulsar charcoal infused toothbrush is battery operated to gently vibrate and polish away stains for a whiter, cleaner smile. Using the same technique to brush as a manual toothbrush, The bristles vibrate providing a gentle massaging and polishing action while brushing. The bristles penetrate between teeth where stain build-up often begins. Pulsar has soft vibrating bristles that help break up plaque between teeth. Plus, the split head design moderates the amount of pressure applied to your teeth and gums. Contouring to your unique smile, The Pulsar toothbrush will leave your smile bright and clean with every use.
features: You will receive 1 Oral-B Pulsar battery toothbrush with charcoal infused bristles, battery included
The Charcoal infused bristles gently vibrate to effectively clean plaque and remove surface stains for whiter teeth
Penetrates deep between teeth and hard-to-reach areas of the mouth to sweep away plaque and stains caused by Food
Adjusts to the contours of your teeth and moderates the pressure applied to your teeth and gums
Oral-B is the #1 dentist-recommended toothbrush brand worldwide

reviews.title: Hello OralB
reviews.text: It’s an Oral-B.  I prefer this brand and hopped on the charcoal type at the advice of my former dentist.  She recommended.

reviews.title: Weak vibration
reviews.text: Not the best

reviews.title: Great Product!
reviews.text: Great Product!

reviews.title: Great toothbrush!
reviews.text: I always use the Oral B battery toothbrushes - I’m over 80, with my original teeth, and this toothbrush has kept me in good shape for years.  I like that they remind me to get a new about every three months.  The charcoal one helps to keep my teeth as white as they can be at this age - no taste involved - just mixes with your toothpaste and it does a great job.  I also find that this toothbrush brushes my gums, too, and I have not had any bleeding gums in years.  This is the only toothbrush I will buy.

reviews.title: Clean Those Teeth
reviews.text:
I love this electric tooth brush, by Oral-B as it is so different from ones I have tried before. I thought I would have to insert the battery but to my surprise it was already inserted and ready to be used. It was so easy and the button you need to push is clearly marked with a + so you push that and you are ready to add toothpaste and brush away. Just push the – sign and it stops. That was so easy and fast and you got a good brushing of your teeth. The bristles are charcoal infused bristle and this adds to completely clean your teeth and makes them feel clean.

I am wondering what one has to do if battery is used up as could not figure out where to change a battery. There was not that much explanations but I am enjoying the use of this great Oral-B for a great battery tooth brush. Great way to start the day with an Oral-B electric tooth cleaning.

description: Enjoy the unprecedented, professional-like, cleaning experience of all-in-one Multi-Action Solodent SILVER SERIES Toothbrushes. Flossing Slim Ultra Soft Bristles gently clean hard to reach areas, between the teeth, under the gum line, and save tooth enamel from abrasion. They softly stimulate sensitive gums without bleeding or pain. Extra Soft Bristles make this toothbrush perfect for those with gum recession, sensitive teeth, exposed roots, implants and braces. Silver infused embossed PBT bristles naturally fight and minimize bacterial growth on bristles and keep them clean between uses. Innovative Patented 3D Embossed PBT Bristles are designed to gently and effectively remove maximum plaque due to multitouch contacts to tooth surfaces. Actual Gold infused bristles. PBT (polybutylene terephthalate) bristles are more durable and less water-absorbent than traditional nylon bristles and outlast them by 50%. Beautiful patent pending diamond pattern design and ergonomic handle. Designed by a dentist. Made in South Korea.

reviews.title: great for sensitive mouths!
reviews.text: I’m on the autism spectrum and my sensory issues around my mouth are so intense that I have had a lifelong phobia of the dentist. (I still go, I just have a a very anxious time.) my only complaint is that you definitely need the travel case because this thing turns itself on in your bag super easily and sounds like a marital aid. 😳

reviews.title: Unable to Install Batteries, having to return item
reviews.text: I was so excited to get my new toothbrush in the mail today but have been trying for the last 30 minutes to get the thing opened so batteries can be installed & it is next to impossible. It has a “open to install” & close, I have turned it to “open to install” it will not open, have even tried to pry it open with a knife to no avail. Instruction booklet does not touch battery installation. If I could get the batteries in - I’d probably LOVE the toothbrush, as it seems to be well made & comes with a tongue scraper/brush & 2 toothbrush heads. Purchased for autistic grandson who has trouble brushing his teeth, hoping to make things easier for his little life but this mimi is getting extra frustrated with the little “no grip” cap that won’t open for battery installation. Now have to go through the dreaded process of processing a return. On a good note, if you’re purchasing it for someone who is severely disabled - you won’t have to worry about them popping the battery compartment open & choking on the batteries because it “ain’t happening” as we say in the south. ***Update to review. Customer service is awesome. Made 1 phone call & they’ve called me back twice & sending a new system with preinstalled batteries. The one I got, must’ve been a fluke. Now updated to a 5star. Very well made. Has a 2 minute timer on it that can be set for children or someone with intellectual disability so they brush teeth for right amount of time. Nice system & wonderul customer service.

title: Philips Sonicare 4100 Electric Rechargeable Power Toothbrush, Black, with Genuine Optimal Plaque Control Replacement Toothbrush Heads, White, 3 Pack
description: Remove plaque and experience a deep, effective clean with Sonicare technology, removing up to 5x-7x more plaque vs. a manual toothbrush. Sonicare technology gently pulses water between your teeth, for a month's worth of manual brushing in just 2 minutes. The QuadPacer lets you know when you've spent the optimal amount of time on each section of your mouth while the SmarTimer signals when your 2 minutes is up. The pressure sensor flashes red to remind you to ease off, helping to prevent gum recession, while the 2 intensity settings ensure a comfortable clean that’s right for you. Going electric might feel like a big step, but with this brush you’re in safe hands. Its slim ergonomic design and familiar-shaped head gives you everything you need for an effective clean. The kit includes 1 Philips Sonicare 4100 electric toothbrush, 1 Optimal Plaque Control (C2) brush head and 1 USB charger (wall adaptor not included). An additional 3 pack of Optimal Plaque Control (C2) brush heads included.

title: GO SMILE BLU Foaming Whitening Toothpaste for Blue-Light Toothbrushes, Light Activated Stain Removal & Enamel Whitening Formula to Freshen Breath & Clean Teeth Without Sensitivity, Mint Flavor 2.3 oz
features: Photocatalyst Whitening - Our special formula is a light activated foaming toothpaste that rapidly whitens teeth when paired with GO SMILE BLU blue light toothbrushes. Experience the powerful cleaning of the foaming micro scrubbers while achieving maximum whitening results and stain removal simultaneously.

Advanced Teeth Whitening Formula - Our foaming toothpaste effectively cleans and break up plaque that accrues on teeth, especially after dark liquids like coffee, tea, or red wines. The bubbles penetrate those hard-to-reach places regular toothpaste can't get to.

A Powerful Toothpaste For Professional Results - Remove tough stains and prevent new stains from setting with our specially formula that penetrates teeth for deep whitening and not just surface stains.

Gentle Whitening - Our GO SMILE foaming toothpaste is safe to use on crowns, veneers, and other dental materials. Our toothpaste has been proven to whiten up to 10x better than the leading whitening toothpaste.

Created by a dentist, GO SMILE has been whitening smiles for nearly 20 years. Based in the San Francisco Bay Area, we have revolutionized at-home and on-the-go teeth whitening products that are safe, effective and clinically proven to whiten with no sensitivity. Our products are known for their innovation, ease of use and award-winning results.

reviews.text: [[VIDEOID:43eb444c7fc5734c88e2c00c67e2f0fc]] Ordered these to brush my kids teeth. They help simplify the process of trying with a regular tooth brush at this time. Fits on fingers well. Soft and gentle on gums snd helps get teeth clean. Im satisfied.

reviews.title: Perfect...For My Cats. :))
reviews.text: My vet advised me to brush my cats' teeth at least 3x a week. They haven't liked the typical toothbrushes used for this, so I decided to try these. They tolerate these brushes really well and even seem to enjoy the "massage" these brushes give them. I have two cats so it was great that these came in a two-pack so each gets their own toothbrush. They work well with the "cat toothpaste" I use and I haven't had any issues with the little silicone bristles coming off like the bristles on other types of toothbrushes. It slips over my finger and fits perfectly - just snug enough that I have good control, which is imperative for brushing pet teeth, and it also gives some protection in case of biting. This hasn't been an issue for me, since my cats are young and are used to having their teeth brushed at this point. The key to successful tooth brushing for cats is starting slow and being consistent. Glad to have found these, because they really do make the process a lot easier and I'm able to get the job done a lot faster and with less fuss from my fur babies. I'm also more confident that these can be kept cleaner than a typical toothbrush due to being made of silicone because the last thing you want is to spread more bacteria around! Would definitely buy these again when they wear out, but they seem durable enough that they will last for years.

description: Ooak Standard V++ Max Technology Medium - 2 Pack RedOoak Standard V++ Max Technology Light Tapered V++Max bristles offer a unique design that simultaneously cleans teeth and removes plaque along the gum line. Outer bristles are positioned to gently stimulate gums for an overall healthier mouth. Dental Professional Recommended

reviews.title: Clean Teeth &Gums
reviews.text: These toothbrushes are designed to clean teeth while simultaneous removing plaque from the gum line. The outer bristles angle out. I found the brush to be effective. The bristles are gentle. I have sensitive gums and they were not irritated or sore after use. Good brush.

reviews.title: Very wide
reviews.text: This is a good toothbrush. It is quite unusual. It is very, very wide. Make sure you see how much. I don't think I've ever seen one this wide. How it works for you is just going to depend on whether you like that. You can get a lot more at the same time, but some people may find it uncomfortable, especially if you have a small mouth. But it is a way to be very efficient and get a lot of areas. It feels well made. It seems like a quality brush.

reviews.title: Very wide
reviews.text: This is a good toothbrush. It is quite unusual. It is very, very wide. Make sure you see how much. I don't think I've ever seen one this wide. How it works for you is just going to depend on whether you like that. You can get a lot more at the same time, but some people may find it uncomfortable, especially if you have a small mouth. reviews.title: Nothing fancy but does the job.
reviews.text: Toothbrushes are necessary and seem to be the one thing that I forget to purchase when I go to the store. So, ordering these Ooak toothbrushes was a no-brainer. These are not fancy. They are traditional toothbrushes that leave your teeth feeling smooth and clean (grit free). There are five rows of soft bristles…the three rows in the center are straight and the outside (colored) ones are slightly angled. The colors of the brushes are neutral, white and orange. The rubber grip handle makes it easy to grip and hold. And finally, on Amazon this two pack is under $7, which is reasonable when compared to other two packs on the market. I’d recommend these.

reviews.title: A unique set of toothbrushes
reviews.text: This toothbrush set has been designed in a V design for the bristles - which means that it looks different than other toothbrushes. The bristles have a lot of space to get in the gum line, in between teeth and works well. I got the medium bristles which are fine with me. I don't want too hard of a bristle, as that is not recommended by the dentist. This does a decent job cleaning.

title: N-amboo Super Hard Toothbrush Bamboo Toothbrush Large Brush Head Manual Toothbrsuh Hard Bristles Pack of 4
description: Super Hard Bristles,More Cleaning Bamboo toothbrush,eco-friendly Large brush head

reviews.title: High quality bamboo toothbrush, worth the money!
reviews.text:
I was looking for a more sustainable toothbrush to replace the plastic ones I've been using forever. I found out about bamboo toothbrushes and I had to try them.

What I really like about these is how big the heads on them are. The wood is nice and smooth and it's easy to hold. I also prefer firm toothbrushes and picked these specifically because they were marked as "super hard" - and they really do live up to the name, because they were actually a little too hard for me. (I suspect I was brushing too hard since I'm used to different types of brushes, so it's just something I have to get used to.) I'm not knocking down the rating on that, though, because they were true to their advertising. :)

Very good brushes. I plan to buy them again.

reviews.title: These are HARD
reviews.text:
UPDATE: these ended up making my tongue bleed quite a bit. Why you’d need this type of brush for your mouth… I have no idea. Can’t return cause I used it. Otherwise I would , so I think I’ll use them for a teeny bonfire.

I will preface this by saying I use an electric oral b cross action toothbrush . I got these to brush my tongue . And the toothbrush is HARD. Like it made my tongue bleed. Idk who is using this for their teeth lol be careful if u are. It worked amazing for the purpose I got it for but just be cautious.

title: Brush Buddies Hot Wheels Toothbrush for Kids, Kids Toothbrushes, Toothbrush Pack, Soft Bristle Toothbrushes for Kids, Toddler Toothbrush Ages 2-4, 6PK
description: It’s never too early to introduce a healthy oral care routine— start with Brush Buddies Hot Wheels Toothbrushes! Each pack includes 6 soft bristle toothbrushes with a variety of colors and designs for a fun addition to your little one’s mornings and evenings. Each children’s toothbrush features a small, rounded brush head and textured ergonomic handle for easy grip. The bristles are gentle enough to effectively clean while protecting your child’s sensitive gums and enamel.
features: [What's Included] The Brush Buddies Hot Wheels Manual Toothbrush Pack includes 6 multi-colored Hot Wheels kid's toothbrushes.
[Ultra-Gentle] Each soft bristle toothbrush features a rounded brush head for effective, gentle cleaning while protecting your child's delicate gums and enamel.

[Great for Toddlers] Brush Buddies Hot Wheels Toothbrushes are a great introduction to oral care for your toddlers and young children! The small head size and ergonomic handles are ideal for little ones as they learn to brush their teeth.
[Make Brushing Fun] With bright colors and unique car designs, the children's toothbrushes are sure to make every morning a fun and exciting routine.
[Rotate Regularly] Although dentists recommend a new toothbrush every 90 days, it's important to swap your child's toothbrush after they get sick, too!

reviews.title: No good
reviews.text:
I ordered this for my son, and he loved it so much! He had fun brushing his teeth and did such a good job.
For like 2 weeks.
The battery is not waterproofed, so it is all getting wet every time you brush and rinse. So now it doesn't work. I thought it was just a dead battery, but nope. It all got wet and is ruined.
I'm super disappointed. You would think something like a toothbrush would be better sealed to prevent such a thing from happening. And of course, it died right after the return deadline.
Save yourself the money and drama of explaining to a toddler why he can't use his Blippi brush anymore.

reviews.title: good value
reviews.text: for my grandson he loved them

reviews.title: Works as needed.
reviews.text: You get what you pay for. These kids toothbrushes aren’t expensive and what you receive is good value for the money. Yes, some of the toothbrushes get loosened fibers over time, but we don’t keep them long enough to reach that point. The more aggressive of a brusher you are, the quicker you need to replace them. I find that they don’t last 3 months with good consistent brushing, as the quality declines with usage. Overall I’m happy with these for my son, just remember to switch them out within three months. The design is a great bonus for kids that enjoy HotWheels!

reviews.title: good purchase
reviews.text: good purchase but if you have a toddler who likes to chew on the bristles then you’ll realize the bristles can come out.. so just watch out

reviews.title: Good cheap toddler toothbrushes.
reviews.text: My toddler destroys and flattens bristles. These are cheap enough that It doesn’t break the bank when she needs a new one every few weeks. Bristles also don’t fall out. Will order again.
